lines.speaker: Korgan
lines.text: Human. Are you here to trade ore? If not, I must point out that I have a lot to be getting on with.

lines.speaker: Korgan
lines.text: This is Deepfin Point. Here, my workers and I have set up the finest mining operation you'll ever find. If you wish to do any mining yourself, you are more than welcome to.

lines.speaker: Korgan
lines.text: Alternatively, perhaps you wish to trade ore? If not, I must once again point out that I have a lot of work to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like I'd best not disturb you.
